report.markdown:
# OpenClaw Launch Bible

## Brand Overview
- Idea: I want to sell custom socks delivered in 10 minutes like Zepto but for socks.
- Category: quick-commerce fashion
- Recommended Brand Name: Sockzy

## Domain Recommendation
- Recommended Domain: sockzy.in
- Alternates: pairly.in, feetsy.in, dashsock.in, looplane.in

## Visual Identity
- Mood: playful
- Palette: #FF6A3D, #102A43, #F0F4F8, #17B890

## GTM
- Priority Cities: Bengaluru, Mumbai, Pune, Hyderabad
- Channel Split: Instagram 40%, WhatsApp 30%, Google 30%

## Shopify
- Hero: Sockzy delivers expressive socks at quick-commerce speed.
- Products: Sockzy Classic Rush, Sockzy Print Sprint, Sockzy Premium Pair

## Ads
- Lead Hook: Your socks arrive before your food.

## SEO / GEO
- Primary Keywords: custom socks india, 10 minute delivery socks, premium socks india, best socks brand india 2026, sockzy socks

report.markdown:
# OpenClaw Launch Bible

## Brand Overview
- Idea: I want to sell custom socks delivered in 10 minutes like Zepto but for socks.
- Category: quick-commerce fashion
- Recommended Brand Name: Sockzy

## Domain Recommendation
- Recommended Domain: sockzy.in
- Alternates: pairly.in, feetsy.in, dashsock.in, looplane.in

## Visual Identity
- Mood: playful
- Palette: #FF6A3D, #102A43, #F0F4F8, #17B890

## GTM
- Priority Cities: Bengaluru, Mumbai, Pune, Hyderabad
- Channel Split: Instagram 40%, WhatsApp 30%, Google 30%

## Shopify
- Hero: Sockzy delivers expressive socks at quick-commerce speed.
- Products: Sockzy Classic Rush, Sockzy Print Sprint, Sockzy Premium Pair

## Ads
- Lead Hook: Your socks arrive before your food.

## SEO / GEO
- Primary Keywords: custom socks india, 10 minute delivery socks, premium socks india, best socks brand india 2026, sockzy socks

idea: I want to sell custom socks delivered in 10 minutes like Zepto but for socks.

idea.raw: I want to sell custom socks delivered in 10 minutes like Zepto but for socks.

clarification_questions.question: What cities in India should we prioritise first?
clarification_questions.assumption: Assuming Bengaluru, Mumbai, and Pune are the phase-one launch cities.

clarification_questions.question: What price point are we targeting?
clarification_questions.assumption: Assuming an accessible premium launch price band of Rs 399 to Rs 799.

clarification_questions.question: Is this direct-to-consumer only or open to quick-commerce channels?
clarification_questions.assumption: Assuming D2C first with quick-commerce partnerships explored in phase two.

competitors.name: Bombay Sock Company
competitors.notes: Strong design language but weaker instant-delivery positioning.

competitors.notes: Good D2C merchandising but limited urgency-led messaging.

competitors.notes: Not a direct competitor in socks, but defines delivery speed expectations.

research.market_size_inr: Rs 1,200 crore+ annual addressable opportunity across urban socks and gifting segments.
research.whitespace: Own the intersection of expressive design, instant gratification, and gifting convenience for tier-1 urban buyers.
research.india_insight: Fast-delivery expectations are now normalized by grocery apps, creating room for a specialized brand that turns urgency into novelty and repeat gifting.

- Idea: I want to sell custom socks delivered in 10 minutes like Zepto but for socks.
- Category: quick-commerce fashion
- Recommended Brand Name: Sockzy

## Domain Recommendation
- Recommended Domain: sockzy.in
- Alternates: pairly.in, feetsy.in, dashsock.in, looplane.in

- Mood: playful
- Palette: #FF6A3D, #102A43, #F0F4F8, #17B890

## GTM
- Priority Cities: Bengaluru, Mumbai, Pune, Hyderabad
- Channel Split: Instagram 40%, WhatsApp 30%, Google 30%

- Hero: Sockzy delivers expressive socks at quick-commerce speed.
- Products: Sockzy Classic Rush, Sockzy Print Sprint, Sockzy Premium Pair

## Ads
- Lead Hook: Your socks arrive before your food.

## SEO / GEO
- Primary Keywords: custom socks india, 10 minute delivery socks, premium socks india, best socks brand india 2026, sockzy socks

# OpenClaw Launch Bible

## Brand Overview
- Idea: I want to launch a premium herbal tea brand for busy professionals in India.
- Category: d2c lifestyle
- Recommended Brand Name: IWant

## Domain Recommendation
- Recommended Domain: iwant.in
- Alternates: ily.in, ico.in, ihive.in, ilane.in

## Visual Identity
- Mood: playful
- Palette: #FF6A3D, #102A43, #F0F4F8, #17B890

## GTM
- Priority Cities: Bengaluru, Mumbai, Pune, Hyderabad
- Channel Split: Instagram 40%, WhatsApp 30%, Google 30%

## Shopify
- Hero: IWant delivers expressive socks at quick-commerce speed.
- Products: IWant Classic Rush, IWant Print Sprint, IWant Premium Pair

## Ads
- Lead Hook: Your socks arrive before your food.

## SEO / GEO
- Primary Keywords: i-want-to-launch-a-premium-herbal-tea-brand-for-busy-professionals-in-india india, 10 minute delivery socks, premium socks india, best socks brand india 2026, iwant socks

# OpenClaw Launch Bible

## Brand Overview
- Idea: I want to sell custom socks delivered in 10 minutes like Zepto but for socks.

## Domain Recommendation
- Recommended Domain: sockzy.in
- Alternates: pairly.in, feetsy.in, dashsock.in, looplane.in

report.markdown:
# OpenClaw Launch Bible

## Brand Overview
- Idea: I want to sell custom socks delivered in 10 minutes like Zepto but for socks.
- Category: quick-commerce fashion
- Recommended Brand Name: Sockzy

## Domain Recommendation
- Recommended Domain: sockzy.in
- Alternates: pairly.in, feetsy.in, dashsock.in, looplane.in

## Visual Identity
- Mood: playful
- Palette: #FF6A3D, #102A43, #F0F4F8, #17B890

## GTM
- Priority Cities: Bengaluru, Mumbai, Pune, Hyderabad
- Channel Split: Instagram 40%, WhatsApp 30%, Google 30%

## Shopify
- Hero: Sockzy delivers expressive socks at quick-commerce speed.
- Products: Sockzy Classic Rush, Sockzy Print Sprint, Sockzy Premium Pair

## Ads
- Lead Hook: Your socks arrive before your food.

## SEO / GEO
- Primary Keywords: custom socks india, 10 minute delivery socks, premium socks india, best socks brand india 2026, sockzy socks

idea: I want to sell custom socks delivered in 10 minutes like Zepto but for socks.

clarification_questions.question: What cities in India should we prioritise first?

clarification_questions.question: What price point are we targeting?
clarification_questions.assumption: Assuming an accessible premium launch price band of Rs 399 to Rs 799.

clarification_questions.question: Is this direct-to-consumer only or open to quick-commerce channels?
clarification_questions.assumption: Assuming D2C first with quick-commerce partnerships explored in phase two.

report.markdown:
# OpenClaw Launch Bible

## Brand Overview
- Idea: I want to sell custom socks delivered in 10 minutes like Zepto but for socks.
- Category: quick-commerce fashion
- Recommended Brand Name: Sockzy

## Domain Recommendation
- Recommended Domain: sockzy.in
- Alternates: pairly.in, feetsy.in, dashsock.in, looplane.in

## Visual Identity
- Mood: playful
- Palette: #FF6A3D, #102A43, #F0F4F8, #17B890

## GTM
- Priority Cities: Bengaluru, Mumbai, Pune, Hyderabad
- Channel Split: Instagram 40%, WhatsApp 30%, Google 30%

## Shopify
- Hero: Sockzy delivers expressive socks at quick-commerce speed.
- Products: Sockzy Classic Rush, Sockzy Print Sprint, Sockzy Premium Pair

## Ads
- Lead Hook: Your socks arrive before your food.

## SEO / GEO
- Primary Keywords: custom socks india, 10 minute delivery socks, premium socks india, best socks brand india 2026, sockzy socks

idea: I want to sell custom socks delivered in 10 minutes like Zepto but for socks.

idea.raw: I want to sell custom socks delivered in 10 minutes like Zepto but for socks.

clarification_questions.question: What cities in India should we prioritise first?
clarification_questions.assumption: Assuming Bengaluru, Mumbai, and Pune are the phase-one launch cities.

clarification_questions.question: What price point are we targeting?
clarification_questions.assumption: Assuming an accessible premium launch price band of Rs 399 to Rs 799.

clarification_questions.question: Is this direct-to-consumer only or open to quick-commerce channels?
clarification_questions.assumption: Assuming D2C first with quick-commerce partnerships explored in phase two.

competitors.name: Bombay Sock Company
competitors.notes: Strong design language but weaker instant-delivery positioning.

competitors.name: SuperSox
competitors.notes: Good D2C merchandising but limited urgency-led messaging.

competitors.name: Zepto
competitors.notes: Not a direct competitor in socks, but defines delivery speed expectations.

research.market_size_inr: Rs 1,200 crore+ annual addressable opportunity across urban socks and gifting segments.
research.whitespace: Own the intersection of expressive design, instant gratification, and gifting convenience for tier-1 urban buyers.
research.india_insight: Fast-delivery expectations are now normalized by grocery apps, creating room for a specialized brand that turns urgency into novelty and repeat gifting.
